common.distress_notice: I sense you may be distressed. I'll respond gently.
common.unsaved_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

auth.welcome_subtitle:
You don't need to become anyone here.
Just say what you want, at your own pace.
auth.options_title: How would you like to continue?
auth.options_subtitle: No account to create. Just step in.
auth.verify_subtitle: We sent a sign-in link to
auth.verify_hint: Open the link in your email to continue.
auth.error_generic: Something didn't go through. Let's try again.
auth.error_network: We couldn't connect. Check your connection and try again.
auth.error_invalid_email: That doesn't look like an email address. Mind checking?
auth.error_popup_closed: Looks like the window was closed. Try again when you're ready.
auth.error_popup_blocked: Your browser blocked the sign-in window. Please allow popups and try again.
auth.error_unauthorized_domain: This domain isn't authorized for sign-in yet. Please contact support.
auth.error_too_many: Too many attempts. Take a breath and try again shortly.
auth.error_disabled: This account has been disabled. Please reach out if this seems wrong.
auth.error_link_expired: This link has expired or was already used. Please request a new one.
auth.error_missing_email: We couldn't find your email. Please enter it below to continue.
auth.verify_enter_email: Enter your email to complete sign-in

onboarding.seen_subtitle:
The more we understand you,
the better we can resonate with you.
onboarding.seen_hint: You can stop anytime and continue later.
onboarding.life_story_title:
Could you briefly describe
your life journey so far?
onboarding.invite_title:
Would you like to explore
a few more questions like this?
onboarding.invite_subtitle: They help me understand you more deeply — so I can resonate with you better.
onboarding.complete_subtitle:
You can always continue sharing
whenever you feel ready.
onboarding.uq_1:
What are you most proud of
in your life?
onboarding.uq_3:
What was your childhood dream,
and has it changed?
onboarding.uq_4:
How would you describe yourself
in a sentence or two?
onboarding.uq_5:
What is your biggest interest
or passion?
onboarding.uq_6:
Is there a person, or a quote,
that has deeply influenced you?
onboarding.desire_title:
What do you want more of
in your life right now?
onboarding.desire_note: There's no right answer. This is just for you.
onboarding.welcome_subtitle:
You don't need to become anyone here.
Just say what you want, at your own pace.
onboarding.q3_title: Which age range feels closest to you?

optional_cards.hobby_title:
If you had one extra hour today,
what would you want to use it for?
optional_cards.self_desc_title:
If you had to describe yourself in one sentence,
what would it be?
optional_cards.self_desc_hint: e.g. A happy fool / Someone who thinks a lot but lives simply
optional_cards.zodiac_title: Would you like to share your zodiac sign?

me_questions.intro:
These are just for you.
Take your time. Or leave them blank.
me_questions.q1_title:
Is there something in your life
that still makes you feel proud?
me_questions.q2_title:
Is there something you regret?
You don't have to answer.
me_questions.q3_title:
Who did you want to be as a child?
Looking back, what has changed?
me_questions.q4_title:
If you described yourself in one sentence now,
would it be the same as before?
me_questions.q5_title:
When you're tired,
what do you usually do to feel better?
me_questions.q6_title:
Is there a sentence,
or a person,
that once truly hit you at some moment?
me_questions.footer:
What you write here belongs to you.
You can change or remove it anytime.

reflect.title: REFLECT
reflect.step0_subtitle:
This is not a stage.
You don't need to perform.
reflect.keep_context_desc:
So you can finish one thought.
Not saved. Not used for matching.
Clear anytime.
reflect.step1_subtitle: How should we treat your words?
reflect.opt_listen_hint: Reflect my thinking without pushing it forward
reflect.opt_clarify_hint: Extract the logic chain and make it clear
reflect.opt_blindspot_hint: Ask deeper questions and expand the thought
reflect.opt_blindspot_warning: Guide deepens the thinking through questions, but never decides for you; you can switch to 'Mirror' anytime.
reflect.opt_polish: Expression Helper · Help me express it better
reflect.opt_polish_hint: Refine the language and offer better phrasing
reflect.step1_footer: You can change the default response in 'Me' at any time.
reflect.mirror_subtitle:
What you just said
might reflect this:
reflect.mirror_footer:
We use AI not to give you answers,
but to help you see yourself.
reflect.bridge_title:
Connection happens
when you see yourself clearly.
reflect.bridge_desc:
Seen does not manufacture relationships.
Only when your expression becomes clear,
will we present the few who truly resonate.
reflect.bridge_footer: There is no rush. Connection is never the goal.

resonate.title: Resonate
resonate.step0_desc:
As your expression clears,
those who resonate will draw near.
resonate.card_title: You are highly aligned on 'Conflict Style' and 'Life Pace'.
resonate.card_subtitle: This is not a label, but a resonance in expression.
resonate.footer_note: Connection requires mutual consent. Private conversation.
resonate.confirm_desc:
You will send a request to a resonated peer.
They can choose to accept or ignore.
The conversation will remain private.
resonate.waiting_desc:
You sent a request.
No response yet. You don't need to do anything else.
resonate.empty_desc:
You can continue expressing,
or come back when you are ready.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Only private conversations you chose to enter.
inbox.system_msg:
You connected through understanding.
No need to please, no need to explain.
Just express as you are.

me.title: Me
me.subtitle: This is not a profile page, but the boundaries you set for yourself.
me.menu_questions_sub: Questions that belong only to you

understanding.title: Inner Structure
understanding.desc:
This is not a test, there are no right answers.
These answers help AI understand you better,
and help you meet those who truly resonate.

value_orientation.title: When facing a choice, what are you more responsible to?
value_orientation.desc: No right or wrong, just where you lean when deciding.

self_vs_relationship.title: When your wants conflict with others' expectations?
self_vs_relationship.desc: Your basic stance when facing the world.

conflict_handling.title: Your first reaction to disagreement?
conflict_handling.desc: Not 'who is right', but where you start understanding.

life_pace.title: Your life pace leans towards?
life_pace.desc: Some walk fast, some walk deep. Neither is better.

connection_depth.title: What kind of connection do you enjoy?
connection_depth.desc: Some need proximity, some need understanding.

money_view.title: What is money to you?
money_view.desc: The role of money affects almost every choice.

risk_attitude.title: When basic needs are met, you likely?
options: ⚖️ Depends on context, not limited by rule
risk_attitude.desc: Not brave or conservative, but how you face uncertainty.

life_worth.title: What makes life worth living?
options: 🧭 Walking on a path I believe in
🌍 creating meaning for others or the world
life_worth.desc: What you deem 'worthy' decides who gets your time.

expression_style.title: How do you naturally express yourself?

connection_intent.title: What connection do you seek here?
connection_intent.desc: Not a goal, but who you want to walk with.

understanding.footer: This info is not public, only for building your inner boundaries.

ai_response.title: How I am Accompanied
ai_response.desc:
This is not 'Who am I', but:
'How I wish to be understood and accompanied.'
ai_response.module_a_title: Who should AI be more like?

mirror.title: Mirror
mirror.desc: Reflect my thinking so I feel understood

organizer.title: Organizer
organizer.desc: Extract the logic chain and clarify my thinking

helper.title: Expression Helper
helper.desc: Refine the language and provide better phrasing

guide.title: Guide
guide.desc: Ask deeper questions and expand my thinking

ai_response.module_a_note: These are not four tones of voice, but four cognitive functions: reflect, structure, express, and explore.
ai_response.module_b_title: How much intervention do you want?
ai_response.module_b_note: Sometimes you need to be heard, sometimes challenged.
ai_response.module_c_title: When emotions run high, AI should?

privacy.title: Sovereignty Over Self
privacy.desc:
You are not a product.
Your expression does not belong to the platform.
privacy.export_explanation: Export is for your own backup and portability. Files are generated on your device and are not uploaded. You can clear anytime.
privacy.export_scope: Export includes: Your saved expressions and Me answers. Does not include: matching results, others' data, or system logs.
privacy.module_a_note: Every word you said can be taken with you.
privacy.module_b_note: Once deleted, system keeps no copies.
privacy.confirm_msg:
Your expression is yours.
Once deleted, we cannot recover it.
privacy.footer_desc:
No data selling · No ad profiling
No third-party access · No identifiable profiles
